claim: OQ-1 resolved: Phase 001 scope narrows from 're-import v0.2.33 upstream' to 'diff current fork vs. downloaded snapshot, then decide flat vs src/ layout'; re-pulling upstream is a follow-on step only.

OQ-2 resolved: Phase 005 (skill-advisor first-action mandate sub-packet) must be MERGED into the next advisor contract packet, not shipped standalone, to avoid a second inconsistent MUST-invoke vocabulary alongside 103's shipped three-tier contract.

OQ-3 resolved: Phase 008/009 feedback-reducers P0 correctness fixes must be split into an immediate sub-phase; learning reducers (RQ-B3/B4/B5) remain shadow-gated and cannot advance until the P0 split lands.

OQ-4 resolved: 027 eval scope is telemetry-based (shadow mode thresholds), not XCE-like productivity benchmarking; no new eval harness needed in 027; 028's code-graph adoption eval is the external promotion gate.
OQ-5 resolved: Coco few-shot exemplars (RQ-A4) move to 028; LLM-curated memory_context (RQ-B2 shadow) becomes standalone 027 phase 009-memory-context-curator, not bundled with coco extras.

causal-edges.ts:L269-L288 checks createdBy === 'auto' only; session-trace reducer's 'auto-session' value bypasses NFR-R01 cap; fix required before phase 004 ships: isAutoEdgeCreator(cb) must include cb.startsWith('auto-').

memory-retention-sweep.ts:L52-L68 selects expired rows by delete_after ONLY, ignoring importance_tier; constitutional records can be deleted on TTL expiry; RetentionExpiredRow must include tier, is_pinned, access_count, last_accessed.

Live trigger matching has 30-50ms PASS / 100ms WARN budget (trigger-matcher.ts:L132-L160); synchronous embedding would exceed this; backfill must go through embedding-pipeline.ts:L143-L169, never inside the live trigger call.

RerankClient extraction boundary must exclude all memory-pipeline internals (MMR, MPAB, vec_memories, path-class semantics, causal metadata); client-level provider abstraction only; cross-encoder.ts:L35-L60 has the right shape.

passes_threshold === true bypass in render.ts:L124-L133 and skill-advisor-brief.ts:L148-L162 allows high-uncertainty records to render mandate wording; renderer-side uncertainty re-check or producer invariant proof required before MUST-invoke wording ships.
